message:
feat(mermaid): sequence diagram layout + render enhancements (bd-2kn9a)

- Layout: participant-aware column positioning, control block cluster
  regions (loop/alt/opt/par/critical), lifeline bounding box extension
- Render: control block frame rendering with keyword labels (loop, alt,
  etc.), activation bar rendering on lifelines
- Uses sequence_participants for column layout when available

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
